summary:
Oxalic acid is known to cause distinctive blackish-blue staining within the gastrointestinal tract that could result in a bluish appearance of the stomach at post mortem exam. This matches best among provided poisons based on its well-documented effects leading to such characteristic discolourations after ingestion followed by fatal outcome. \boxed{D}
